text: B e e e . GGT Originates from the canalicular (bile) surface of hepatocyte ALP Originates from the canalicular (bile) surface of hepatocyte Also from bone (produced during bone formation), intestine ‘and placenta. AST Originates from the hepatocyte cytoplasm, hepatocyte ‘mitochondria and from muscle (skeletal and cardiac) ALT Originates from the hepatocyte cytoplasm
